description: Dr. Maya Chen Clinic was founded in New York with a simple mission: to provide accessible, high-quality Traditional Chinese Medicine care to the New York community.
What started as a small practice has grown into a trusted wellness center, helping over 1,000 patients achieve better health naturally.
clinic.environment: Our clinic provides a peaceful, welcoming environment designed to promote relaxation and healing. From the moment you enter, you'll feel the difference - calming colors, comfortable treatment rooms, and a warm, friendly atmosphere that puts patients at ease.

journey.story:
Pacific Meridian Care opened its doors in 2017 with a vision to bridge ancient wisdom and modern life in the heart of New York City. Founded by Dr. Maya Chen after witnessing countless patients struggle with symptoms that conventional medicine couldn't fully address, our clinic was born from a deep belief that true healing happens when we treat the whole person, not just isolated conditions.

Our approach honors the time-tested principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while integrating evidence-informed practices that resonate with today's health-conscious families. We've become a trusted sanctuary where busy New Yorkers can slow down, reconnect with their body's natural healing capacity, and receive personalized care that addresses root causes rather than surface symptoms.

Over the years, we've built lasting relationships within our diverse community, serving patients from all walks of life who share a common desire for gentle, effective healthcare. Whether you're seeking relief from chronic pain, support through stressful life transitions, or simply wanting to maintain optimal wellness, Pacific Meridian Care offers a peaceful refuge where your healing journey is honored and supported.
journey.title: My Journey to Chinese Medicine

profile.bio:
Dr. Maya Chen brings over 12 years of dedicated practice in Traditional Chinese Medicine to her New York clinic, having earned her Doctorate in Acupuncture and Chinese Medicine (DACM) and achieved recognition as an NCCAOM Diplomate. Her journey into TCM began during her own healing experience with chronic pain, where she discovered the profound ability of acupuncture and herbal medicine to restore balance when conventional treatments fell short.

Specializing in pain management and stress care, Dr. Chen has developed a unique approach that weaves together classical TCM diagnosis with modern understanding of how stress and lifestyle impact our health. Her gentle needle technique and carefully crafted herbal formulas reflect years of study with respected masters and continuous learning in both traditional texts and contemporary research. She believes deeply in the body's innate wisdom to heal when given the right support and environment.

What sets Dr. Chen apart is her ability to create genuine connections with her patients while honoring the sacred traditions of Chinese Medicine. She takes time to truly listen, understanding that each person's path to wellness is unique. Her bilingual practice allows her to serve both English and Mandarin-speaking communities, bridging cultural approaches to health and making the profound benefits of TCM accessible to diverse families throughout New York.
profile.name: Dr. Maya Chen, L.Ac., DACM
profile.quote: The body holds infinite wisdom for healing - we simply need to listen and support its natural desire for balance.
profile.title: Licensed Acupuncturist

philosophy.title: Treatment Philosophy

principles.title: Treat the Whole Person
principles.description: TCM recognizes that physical symptoms are often connected to emotional, mental, and spiritual factors. Dr. Maya Chen addresses all aspects of health, not just isolated symptoms.

principles.title: Find the Root Cause
principles.description: Rather than merely suppressing symptoms, treatment focuses on identifying and addressing the underlying imbalances that create disease. This approach leads to lasting results.

principles.title: Personalized Care
principles.description: No two patients are alike. Each treatment plan is carefully customized based on your unique constitution, health history, and current condition.

principles.title: Patient Education
principles.description: Understanding your body and condition empowers you to take an active role in your healing. Dr. Maya Chen takes time to explain your diagnosis and treatment in clear, accessible terms.

principles.title: Integration with Western Medicine
principles.description: TCM can work beautifully alongside conventional medical care. Dr. Maya Chen collaborates with other healthcare providers to ensure comprehensive, coordinated treatment.

principles.title: Prevention & Wellness
principles.description: The best medicine prevents illness before it occurs. Treatment includes guidance on diet, lifestyle, and self-care practices to maintain long-term health.

philosophy.introduction: Dr. Maya Chen's approach to healing is rooted in the fundamental principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine while incorporating modern clinical understanding.

specializations.title: Areas of Specialization
specializations.description: Through years of clinical practice and continuing education, Dr. Maya Chen has developed particular expertise in several key areas:

items: Classical Chinese Herbal Medicine seminars with Dr. Heiner Fruehauf
Annual attendance at national TCM conferences
Regular study groups with local TCM practitioners
30+ hours of continuing education annually (required: 30 hours every 3 years)

continuingEducation.description: Dr. Maya Chen maintains active involvement in the TCM community and regularly pursues advanced training:
